reviews.review_description:
Been running into a bug in chapter 7 repeatedly. I managed to open the door after postitioning the levers correctly but i cannot enter the room - the one with the colored bottles. Its like hitting a wall, i am just able to peek inside the room. 

If I don't complete this level I cannot enter any  other chapters and the game ends here. 

Or is there a fix?

Most of the time it's unresponsive.  The only way I've been able to find clues is to look up tutorials, and they're often in places that just didn't react when I touched them!

Also, there's an ongoing narrative about an artifact that leads to nothing!  Level ten makes it sound like you have an ultimatum, but it's just another scroll!  Then... nothing!

0 replay value!
Can’t even play the game just keeps jumping all the time waste of money

Just completed the first one and I really enjoyed it. Reminds me a lot of the real life escape rooms I've tried. Not crazy hard, but it might take a good minute (or a different way of thinking) to figure stuff out. Can't wait to try the next level. Definitely worth the price!

The game was cheap so I didn't expect it to be very long, but it has 12 or 13 rooms? They weren't too hard where you'd get stuck forever, but challenging enough to be fun. I really like it. I would definitely buy more rooms.

Wow I’m really really impressed with this game. Who would have thought a game a payed a couple dollars for is so much more fun than games I’ve payed 25 for. Keep them coming, thank  you. But it does get complicated when the color codes don’t match a you have to try to guess. An a circuit box? No clues

reviews.review_title: Great game, worth what I paid
reviews.review_description: Good graphics, interesting and challenging puzzles. Plays well. I really enjoyed my first level/challenge, and look forward to playing more of this title.

Don’t give enough clues to wear stuff is everything blocked and some of your puzzles don’t work so you can’t advance or the stuff you do give them is not correct on level one through the door because you colour thing doesn’t work downstairs. You have no clues for that so I don’t know how you’re supposed to progress if you’re not giving the right stuff, so I wouldn’t waste my money at all ￼

A year ago, somebody actually wrote a review stating about the colour problem that you guys were having in the first level and yet you have not fixed it so don’t buy this game because they don’t obviously don’t fix their stuff. They’re just in it for the money. ￼

I had this title a long time ago from Sidequest but I had to buy It again since the developers never answerd to my email (requesting a free Key).
Anyway, I like this title but It shows its Age, now.
If u like escape, It Is a good title.
I enjoy the game but when it loads the screen flashes and I have to quit game several times till it loads where I can play it would give it 5 stars if it wasn't for that..
I was so excited to play this game. Too bad it doesn't work at all. It constantly glitches in and out.
This game should have gave you a option if you wanted snap turns or Smooth turns. Please fix it.  It's not good for my eyes the way the snap turn is.  Thank you

￼ You know the times when a game is so difficult it’s just not fun anymore? Yeah. You have an hour in the easy mode to get through the levels and at times you have to guess four colors in order to unlock a door code. Now the chances￼ of three will set you back a good five minutes? And God for bid you second-guess yourself wondering if you made sure to hit ￼the lock button after every single guess attempt . I mean come on, and the references to the order of the colors anywhere in these low color rooms? I don’t care how long you stared at any of the rooms you’re not gonna find any color pattern anywhere. 
And if it’s there, this should tell you it’s way too difficult to find. I really like the game otherwise mechanically graphics are ok,  but way way too difficult that it’s not even fun.

reviews.review_title: Nice game if you are not color blind
reviews.review_description:
I liked it up through level 3. Level 4 is not possible for me because I'm a bit color blind and can't tell apart the gem colors or the colors on the lock switch (I got someone to help me w the gem colors only to later get stuck on the lock colors). Developers - if you are reading this, please consider only using the primary colors plus black, white, and grey so that  people like me only get 30% of a game to play since it's not possible to get past level 4.

If that was fixed, it would jump to 4 stars for me. A fifth star would require either improving the controls so its easier to select things, or a hint system (or ideally both). But these are secondary issues for me since I can work around them.

I just downloaded it and the first home screen is jumping and buggy. Can't get past that. Sucks, because it's the only game I've paid for through app lab. Just hoping to developer reaches out to me with a fix. I did not allow permissions does that matter?

developer_response.body: Hello canuckdownsouth, please contact me at : stormingtech.info@gmail.com , so we can solve this quickly. Thank you!

reviews.review_description: I have to stop mid-game in almost every single chapter so that I can look up walk-throughs on YouTube. Why are there no in-game hints? Am I missing something? There really should be because some things that might seem intuitive to the designers can be completely obscure to someone playing. So once in a while a little nudge in the right direction would be helpful without having to stop the game.

If you're on the fence with this game because of the time restrictions on how long you have to clear a floor, there is no time restriction if you play on the easiest difficulty level! You can take as long as you want.
It says in the description that you can play this game seated. You certainly can but be prepared to stand up every so often because there's no way you can see what's on the top shelves while you're sitting.
I like the controls, the graphics and the puzzle difficulty. There are no bad guys trying to ruin your day or hurry you up or jump scare you either.
This game is an excellent value. If you enjoy solving puzzles, this one should be an automatic purchase. Enjoy!

Well, what to say about this game... For the price it's great, Nice graphics and sometimes quite challenging. 

But the port from other platforms is obvious. Controls are very simple (point and click) and if I compare it with phone version it lacks some pop-ups, so sometimes you are not sure if you are pointing at the item or it's too far. But I know it would take changing the whole game engine to make it work more like VR game.

For some bugs: 
1) I noticed the virtual floor is about 10cm below the real one.
2) sometimes I got stuck becouse the "pointer" for interaction was not interacting with object till I re-pushed the grip button near the object. e.g. movable painting on the wall or lever.

Enjoying this game immensely. I was coping quite well with the locomotive movement but then found the button to transport so even more comfortable for me now. Excellent value for money. Excellent graphics. Good few hours of gameplay. Dev needs congratulating on making such a great game.

reviews.review_title: How and why is this so cheap?!
reviews.review_description:
This is amazing! The value is unparalleled. There is so much replayability and the graphics are great! 

10000000% must buy

developer_response.body: Well this is game didn't pass for Official Store, so i decided to give it on permanent 50%. At least you get to enjoy it :-)

reviews.review_title: One of the best EscapeRoom games onQuest
reviews.review_description: One of the best EscapeRoom games on Quest, especially for the price.
Mechanics work well and the graphics are very well done. You can’t beat the amount of content for the price. Highly recommend if you enjoy puzzles/escape room games.

The graphics are great, but quite regularly they  turn either completely black or you can only see the frames of the spaces floating in the air.
Controls are rather temperamental too, teleporting for example tends to stop working. It's also difficult to know which objects are interactive, because you need to be really close to them for anything to happen. 
After the latest Quest update it's not possible to play sitting down anymore, because whatever you do in the app or out of it, you remain close to the floor level even on the highest setting and are unable to see the top of shelves. Even the tabletops are kind of high, and in order to find anything that's placed a bit higher, you just have to point the beam blindly and hope that you're close enough to pick up any items that might be there (or stand up which I'm not very well able to do atm). I played the first room before the update and this problem wasn't there then.
It's a promising game, the potential is definitely there and at 2,99€ it's a steal, but needs work before it's ready to be released in the store, if that's the intention.

Functional puzzle game in the format of 10 escape rooms. Successfully played through all 10 rooms. Got stumped on a couple puzzles and every time it turned out the hint/solution was hidden underneath or behind something that I didn't realize moved.

It's a decent escape room game. Looks okay for mobile VR but gets a bit repetitive. The user interface could stand some more VRification (like being able to grab things rather than point and click). Hit boxes are a bit hit and miss, which is especially annoying when you're trying to see if an object is movable or not. Also you get shifts in the world in unexpected situations (like your head not being able to move on top of boxes). 

For 3 euros I'm happy enough with the purchase though. I assume if it makes it to the main store at some point it'll have gotten some user interface love.
What a great escape room game, exactly what I was looking for well detailed and the puzzles are good. I hope they do more rooms further down the line but great work developer on this one
Enjoying it very much. Challenging, great graphics. Have to get used to the teleporting style for movement, over all well worth the time.
It's a very good escape room type game. My 2 issues are that it's the only vr game that has given me motion sickness and the Lazer pointer color changing doesn't seem to work.

reviews.review_title: Premium game at the price of a coffee
reviews.review_description:
What a fantastic game ..Devs take note this is how you get PcVR quality graphics out of the quest .. great level design ..10 levels to conquer & not an eternity to complete them 

Puzzles challenging but not direct from the mensa hall of fame challenging lol ..for thickos like me I would of added the ability to save & restart the level instead of losing progress if you quit ..other than that would of paid £22.95 and been very happy 

Great job 😁

Jumped in after a month without using 
And it's now saying to access all levels I need to buy the full version .....well I did buy the full version ???? Now I just have the first level ??

What a fabulous game. Absolutely gutted it’s not going to have additional levels. Oculus, sort yourselves out, the ratings for this game show how good it is/can be. Devs, please please please add more levels.

This game is really fun. I love escape rooms and I’ve thought that VR would be a perfect platform for Escape Rooms. I’ve only played the first room and it was kind of easy. I look forward to playing through the rest. PLEASE PLEASE PLEASE make it multiplayer. My friends and I would pay the whole price of the game for every level if it was done right and multiplayer. Thanks for the cool experience.
Great game. Wish it was multiplayer like the real escape room games

This was so much fun. My son and played this, he watched as I cast it to my tv and helped verbally. Some of the  puzzles are tougher than others.  The ambient sounds really give it a more realistic feel.  Really hoping to see more of this. Puzzle games are some of our favorites.  Good job on this one!

I couldn't get anywhere in it. I did the puzzles at the beginning but nothing happened. It looks like it would be a really good game but it really doesn't work. I hope they get it fixed because I would love to play it.

I paid around £2.50 for this game. The graphics are great very similar to the house in resident evil on the PSVR . Obviously minus the crazy residents!

Puzzles are challenging and get you thinking, controls are however a little clunky at times.

There’s plenty of walkthroughs for this game online if you do get stuck.


I mean for the price it’s unbelievable value. I’ve already sunk a good few hours in to it and I’m  only on level 3 (maybe I’m stupid! ) There are 10 levels altogether with varying difficulties.  

I mean for the money if you like escape room games you can’t go wrong. What else could you get for that price a Big Mac or a large chocolate bar.

Great game! Really enjoying the chapters and puzzles when the game is working. Unfortunately, 3 out of the 7 chapters I’ve tried so far have rooms in which the teleport feature stops working which makes the puzzle impossible to complete. Super frustrating to get so far and then not be able to walk into the room you need to finish the chapter. Still gave it three stars because the price is so cheap. Would definitely deserve 5 stars if this bug was fixed.

It’s a good puzzler but it’s far from perfect. Hence the drop of one star. You have to expect some bugs as it’s an App Lab game. But the bugs do make the game frustrating. The controls are clunky and not responsive when opening draws and doors, the extra bonus items are sometimes impossible to pick up. You cannot screen record as the visuals jump around and makes the game unstable. There seems to be a lack of theme or story to any of the puzzles. The random notes lying around add nothing to the puzzles. Very strange European accent that reads them out.  The floor level isn’t right either. 

To the developer. If you fixed the bugs, improved the theme / story. Like Alice in wonderland themed escape room, or doctor who etc. Doesn’t need to be branded, it would make the game a lot better. Add multiplayer to that so you can solve puzzles with friends. You’d be able to charge a lot more. 

But because it’s so cheap it would be unfair to give it less than 4 stars.
Well done, fun, better than much more expensive games, some bags to improve

This scape rooms game is great, 10 different rooms to play with 3 levels keeps you playing it for hours and wanting to come back to do it better than the other times, since each time you enter to a room the clues changes, congrats to the developers hope they can add more rooms or do a second version soon.

I am really enjoying the rooms,  but I am in the fifth escape room, and the game does not let me enter the room with the electronic lock. I tried twice and the same thing happened. Pushing the B button just won’t work. It’s very frustrating as I really want to continue playing. I will be happy to change the rating to five stars if this can be fixed.

I did look at the walk through on YouTube and I was doing everything they did. But when the electronic door was opened, I could see the next room, but when I pressed the B button to go into it, nothing happened. You get a grid on the floor when moving to another position, there was no grid in that room.

developer_response.body: Hey Cheryl, please search on YT for Chapter 5 Walkthroughs, you will get the solution. Either way you can always go to Options from Main menu and click Unlock to get all levels unlocked if you get stuck.
